things.name: Tsingtao Beer Festival (August)
things.description: Asia's largest beer festival at the brewery of the world-famous Tsingtao beer

things.name: Old Town (Badaguan)
things.description: German colonial villas from 1898-1914 in eight tree-lined streets named after mountain passes

things.name: Qingdao Olympic Sailing Centre
things.description: 2008 Olympics sailing venue with a beautiful marina and coastal park

things.name: No.1 Bathing Beach
things.description: Qingdao's most famous sandy beach below the German colonial skyline

things.name: Tsingtao Brewery Museum
things.description: 1903 German brewery with a history of China's most famous beer - unlimited tasting

things.name: Laoshan Mountain
things.description: Taoist sacred mountain east of the city with springs, temples and coastal hiking

things.name: Zhanqiao Pier & Huilan Pavilion
things.description: Qingdao's landmark 440m pier with a pavilion at the end

things.name: Zhongshan Park Cherry Blossom
things.description: Thousands of Japanese cherry trees in bloom in late March

things.name: Underwater World Qingdao
things.description: Large aquarium focusing on Yellow Sea marine life

things.name: Grilled Seafood on Jiaozhou Bay
things.description: Qingdao prawns, clams and scallops grilled over coals at the harbour restaurants
